description: EFA flow-matching actuation for a 3-joint coupled chain: velocity field v(s,a,t) integrated K forward passes from a=0. Corrected 2026 recipe (no iterative energy descent over actions, no BPTT).
features: [cos(thi-gi), sin(thi-gi), omi for i=1..3, sin(th1..3)] + [a1, a2, a3, t]
inference: a=0; for k in 0..K { t=k/K; a += v(s,a,t)/K }; K=1 sufficient
gate: reach_K1>=95, best-of-<=3 seeds (FVI value-training seed variance disclosed; multi-seed study: 2/3 lightened seeds passed)
